[Quick Start](https://skiper-ui.com/v1/skiper1)

## 105+Outstandingcomponents

No extra packages — just one file for each component,  Use directly with your fav ShadCN CLI.

Premium Component

DevouringDetails

The platform's design is deeply inspired by Devouring Details by Rauno. Their lessons are truly another-level  highly recommend checking them out if you want to  sharpen your skills

[Devouring Details](https://devouringdetails.com/) [Rauno.me](https://rauno.me/)

metadata.description: Brand new uncommon components for your Next.js project. Use with ease through shadcn CLI 3.0, featuring fast-growing components and collections that are easy to edit and use.
